title: SeqLocal per-run sample sheet
description: One row per barcode: maps a demuxed barcode to a sample and its order. The order record (assay, primers, sizes) lives in a separate per-order JSON (order.schema.json). Parsed from samplesheet.csv; this schema validates the parsed rows.

barcode.description: demux barcode label, e.g. barcode05 (matches the M1 demux output token)
